# Maxará Aesthetics

> Boutique medical spa in Griffin, Georgia. HydraFacials, chemical peels, laser hair removal, microneedling, waxing, and advanced skincare under medical direction. Founded and led by licensed esthetician Amanda Cortes, with medical direction by Dr. Lori Martin, M.D.

## Practice information

- Legal entity: Second Sight Aesthetics LLC (DBA Maxará Aesthetics)
- Address: 504 S 8th St, Griffin, GA 30224
- Phone: (770) 796-7418
- Email: info@maxaraaesthetics.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM; Saturday and Sunday closed
- Booking: https://maxaraaesthetics.glossgenius.com/services
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/maxaraaesthetics/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maxaraaesthetics/
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/JYSCTDD1RM7QDhTo9

## Team

- **Amanda Cortes** — Licensed Esthetician & Co-Founder. 10+ years of experience. Laser Certified. HydraFacial Specialist.
- **Courtney Nelson** — Client Coordinator. 10+ years customer service.
- **Dr. Lori Martin, M.D.** — Medical Director. MD from Ross University School of Medicine. Residency at Memorial Health University Medical Center, Savannah. Additional training at the Institute for Functional Medicine and the American Academy of Anti-Aging Medicine. Focus on regenerative and anti-aging medicine, functional medicine, and aesthetic medicine.

## Services

- [HydraFacial](https://www.maxaraaesthetics.com/hydrafacial.html): Three tiers — Signature (30 min), Deluxe (45 min), Platinum (60 min). LED light therapy and booster serum options. No downtime.
- [Chemical Peels](https://www.maxaraaesthetics.com/chemical-peels.html): Jessner peel formulations. Face & Neck $125 / 45 min; Chest $125 / 45 min; Body $150 / 60 min.
- [Laser Hair Removal](https://www.maxaraaesthetics.com/laser-hair-removal.html): Candela GentleYAG Pro (1064nm Nd:YAG with Dynamic Cooling). Safe for all skin tones. Small Area from $75 / 15 min; Medium and Large Area tiers available.
- [Microneedling](https://www.maxaraaesthetics.com/microneedling.html): Collagen induction therapy. Three tiers — $200 / 45 min, $275 / 60 min, $300 / 75 min.
- [Waxing](https://www.maxaraaesthetics.com/waxing.html): Face, body, and intimate waxing. Brow/Lip/Chin $15; Underarms $20; Half Leg/Arm $30; Full Leg/Arm $50; Brazilian $50; Bikini $30.
- [Advanced Skincare](https://www.maxaraaesthetics.com/advanced-skincare.html): Ultherapy ($300+ / 60 min), Skin Tag Removal ($75+ / 30 min, $10 per additional), Scar Revision ($200+ / 45 min), Jet Plasma ($200 / 45 min).
- Maxará Classic Facial: $85 / 60 minutes.

## Payment and policies

- Payment methods: Cash, credit card, HSA, FSA, CareCredit, Afterpay.
- [Payment Plans](https://www.maxaraaesthetics.com/payment-plans.html) — Cherry financing.
- [Gift Cards](https://www.maxaraaesthetics.com/gift-cards.html) — eGift cards or traditional cards from $10–$500.
- Cancellation: requests ≥ 24 hours ahead incur no penalty. Late cancellations or no-shows may incur a fee equal to 50% of the service price.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://www.maxaraaesthetics.com/terms-and-conditions.html)
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.maxaraaesthetics.com/privacy-policy.html)
- [Refund Policy](https://www.maxaraaesthetics.com/refund-policy.html)

## Service area

Griffin, Peachtree City, Newnan, Senoia, McDonough, and the rest of Spalding County, Georgia.
